name: Bakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Rub the shortening into the dry ingredients until well combined to form a soft dough.
3. If needed, knead the dough lightly with floured hands.
4. Break off pieces of the dough and roll them into balls.
5. Flatten each ball to about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Fry in hot oil or bake on a hot greased tawa until cooked through.
